changes.value:
## What

Dragging a task card from one window to another does not work. The card can be picked up but dropping on the target window has no effect.

### Investigation needed

Cross-window drag uses the `DragSession` system (`drag-session-context.tsx`). The flow is:
1. Source window: `handleTaskDragStart` → `invoke("dispatch_command", { cmd: "drag.start" })` → emits `drag-session-active` Tauri event
2. Target window: receives `drag-session-active`, shows drop zones for incoming task
3. Target window: `handleZoneDrop` detects different board path → calls `completeSession` → `invoke("dispatch_command", { cmd: "drag.complete" })`
4. Backend emits `drag-session-completed` → both windows clear session state

Possible failure points:
- Secondary window doesn't have `DragSessionProvider` set up correctly
- `drag-session-active` event doesn't reach secondary window
- HTML5 `dataTransfer` data doesn't survive cross-window drag (OS limitation?)
- The `disable_drag_drop_handler()` on secondary windows may interfere with HTML5 drag (not just file drops)
- `boardPath` comparison in `handleZoneDrop` might not detect cross-board correctly

### Files to investigate

- `kanban-app/ui/src/lib/drag-session-context.tsx` — session lifecycle
- `kanban-app/ui/src/components/board-view.tsx:394-420` — drag start/end/zone-drop handlers
- `kanban-app/src/commands.rs` — `disable_drag_drop_handler()` effect on HTML5 drag
- Rust drag commands: `drag.start`, `drag.cancel`, `drag.complete`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Dragging a card from window A to window B moves the card
- [ ] Source window removes the card after successful drop
- [ ] Target window shows the card in the dropped column
- [ ] Drag cancel (dropping outside any window) properly cancels the session

## Tests

- [ ] `drag-session-context.test.tsx`: verify session lifecycle events propagate
- [ ] Integration test: simulate cross-window drag via Tauri events
- [ ] Run: `cd kanban-app/ui && npx vitest run` — all tests pass
Cross-window card drag broken: cards cannot be dragged between windows
